action.description: Wraps the server-side mutation boundary so the client only deals with typed results.
action.title: Server action boundary

clientContainer.description: Keeps the interactive form in a small client island and delegates state transitions to a custom hook.
clientContainer.title: Interactive form boundary

hook.description: Owns client-side form state, validation error mapping, and the action call lifecycle.
hook.title: Client state orchestration

messageTree.description: Shows where the feature message namespaces are aggregated before they join the locale tree.
messageTree.title: Localized message tree

routeEntry.description: Thin page file that unwraps locale params, sets the request locale, and hands off to a screen.
routeEntry.title: Route entry

routeHelper.description: Keeps the public path in one reusable helper instead of scattering raw route strings.
routeHelper.title: Shared route mapping

schema.description: Defines the validation contract and length limits shared by the server boundary.
schema.title: Validation contract

screen.description: Server-first screen that composes containers instead of owning business logic or route concerns.
screen.title: Screen assembly

serverContainer.description: Prepares translated card data without turning the entire section into client code.
serverContainer.title: Server data preparation

description: This page points at the exact files that implement the template's route, screen, container, hook, action, schema, route-helper, and i18n boundaries.
heading: Reference patterns you can inspect in code
